name: Krosan Grip
oracle_text:
Split second (As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.)
Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

name: Force of Vigor
oracle_text:
If it's not your turn, you may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Destroy up to two target artifacts and/or enchantments.

name: Culling Ritual
oracle_text: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less. Add {B} or {G} for each permanent destroyed this way.

name: Bane of Progress
oracle_text: When this creature enters, destroy all artifacts and enchantments. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each permanent destroyed this way.

name: Vandalblast
oracle_text:
Destroy target artifact you don't control.
Overload {4}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

name: Faithless Looting
oracle_text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

name: Wheel of Fortune
oracle_text: Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.

name: Windfall
oracle_text: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way.
